text:
あァ？　なんだァ？
オレがここにいるのが不満、か？
くふふっ！　オレだってアークスだぜ？

What's wrong? Don't like seeing my mug?
Well, too bad! I'm an ARKS op--same as
you.

どいつもこいつも覇気がねぇ……
漫然と歩いてるだけのヤツを見ると
つい殺したくなっちまうな。

You see the way these morons walk around
without any drive? They'd look more alive
with their heads rolling on the ground.

くふふっ、安心しろよ
ココで暴れるほど飢えちゃいねェ。
これでも弁えてるから、な。

Easy, kid. I'm not so thirsty for blood that
I'd let loose here. I've lost my share of
things, but my judgment ain't one of 'em.

ああ、いいぜ、楽しいぜェ。
十年前に似た空気だぜ、これは！
もっともっと愉快にしてやりてェな！

Ho-hoooh! It's starting to feel like the good
ol' days in here again! If you'd seen this
place ten years ago, you'd know what I mean.

もうすぐもっと楽しくなるぜ？
祭りに乗り遅れるなよ？
オマエはメインディッシュ、だからな。

Don't sweat it kid. This oven's just about
to start cookin', and you're our main dish.
All you gotta do is learn to keep up.
